---
title: "test 1"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F)
library(tidyverse)
library(png)
library(grid)
getwd()
```

```{r, plot}
list_farmers = c("Farmer A")

List_Herbicide = c("Clethodim", "Glyphosate", "Sulfometuron", "Terbuthylazine")

hist_name_vec = c("hist_Clethodim.png" , "hist_Glyphosate.png", "hist_Sulfometuron.png", "hist_Terbuthylazine.png")
map_name_vec = c("map_Clethodim.png", "map_Glyphosate.png", "map_Sulfometuron.png", "map_Terbuthylazine.png" )

for (i in 1:length(list_farmers)) {
  # list_farmers[1] = "Farmer A"
  # i = 1
  for (j in 1:4) {
    # hist_name_vec[1] = "hist_Clethodim.png"
    # map_name_vec[1] = "map_Clethodim.png"
    # i = 1
    # j = 2
    img1 <- readPNG(paste0("img/", list_farmers[i], "/", hist_name_vec[j]))
    img2 <- readPNG(paste0("img/", list_farmers[i], "/", map_name_vec[j]))
    
    par(bg="aliceblue", fig=c(0,1,0.8,1), mar=(rep(0,4)), xpd=F)
    plot.new()
    text(x=0.5, y=0.5, labels=paste(List_Herbicide[j]), col="black", cex=1.2)
    
    par(new=T)
    grid.raster(img1, x = unit(0.25, "npc"), y = unit(0.4, "npc"),  width = 0.5)
    grid.raster(img2, x = unit(0.75, "npc"), y = unit(0.4, "npc"), width = 0.5)
    
    # par(bg="white", fig=c(0,1,0,1), mar=(rep(0,4)), xpd=F)
    # rasterImage(img1, 0, 0, 0.5, 0.8)
    # rasterImage(img2, 0.5, 0, 1, 0.8)
    
  }
}
```
